case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS. HEIDE HOWARD

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, HEIDE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL SHINER, AGENT. DEFENDANT HEIDE HOWARD APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, HEIDE $705.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.33 INTEREST, $157.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $891.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
